name: Summer Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, dissolve the Jello according to package instructions.
2. Stir in the granulated white sugar until completely dissolved.
3. Add the milk (or yogurt, sour cream, or buttermilk) and stir until combined.
4. Gently fold in the butter until no clumps remain.
5. Add the flavoring and mix well.
6. Pour the mixture into a greased baking dish and refrigerate until set.
7. Once set, remove from the refrigerator and cut into squares. Serve and enjoy your homemade Summer Fudge!
